CookiesCookies are small digital signature files that are stored by your web browser that allow your preferences to be recorded when visiting the website. Also they may be used to track your return visits to the website.We take our users privacy very seriously and therefore have made this policy as easy to understand as possible.  If you have questions, don't hesitate to contact us.

ChildrenWe do not knowingly collect or store personally identifiable information from anyone under the age of 13 unless or except as permitted by law. ANY PERSON WHO VISITS ANY OF THE WEBSITES OR USES ANY OF THE MOBILE APPS REPRESENTS TO US THAT HE OR SHE IS 13 YEARS OF AGE OR OLDER. If we are made aware that we have received personally identifiable information from someone under 13, We will use reasonable efforts to remove that information from our records.

The information collected by us is hosted in the United States of America and is subject to U.S. state and federal law. If you are accessing our Services from other jurisdictions, please be advised that you are transferring your personal information to us in the United States where data protection and privacy laws may be less stringent than the laws of your country. BY USING OUR WEBSITES AND/OR MOBILE APPS, YOU CONSENT TO THE TRANSFER AND USE OF YOUR PERSONAL INFORMATION IN ACCORDANCE WITH THIS PRIVACY POLICY.

decoder_heading: We also gather non-personally identifiable information from Users of our Services

heading_content_part: We also gather non-personally identifiable information from Users of our Services. Non-personally identifiable information is information that usually cannot by itself be used to identify a particular person or entity, and may include: the Internet Protocol (IP) address, unique device identifiers, anonymous IDs for advertising, operating system, mobile network information, browser type, existing applications, and non-precise device location information (e.g., city or region).

heading_content_part: We respect our users privacy and do not store any user info.  To keep our apps free we do however use select advertising and analytic partners and share certain information with them including but not limited to device identifiers or advertising ID, similar to the way browser cookies work.We do not access or track any geolocation at any time.
